name: Tenda 2K WiFi 6 Indoor PT Camera
description:
Designed for indoor monitoring, this camera captures clear video with a 3 MP sensor and helps you stay aware of activity through AI human detection and real-time alerts. It can also recognize pet movement and baby crying, making it useful for everyday home observation.

It connects through 2.4GHz WiFi 6 for remote access and supports one-touch calling for quick communication. The PT design, 10X digital zoom, and support for up to a 256GB TF card provide flexible viewing and local video storage for continuous use.

name: Xiaomi Smart Camera 2K Indoor Security Camera
description:
This indoor camera provides 2K image quality with a 360° panoramic viewing range for monitoring spaces through the Mi Home app. It supports clear video capture, low-light colour display, and digital zoom for flexible viewing.

The device includes AI human detection, two-way voice calls, and H.265 video encoding technology. It offers storage options with Micro SD card, NAS, and cloud storage support, along with mounting options and screen rotation features.

name: Runpu NDI PTZ AI Tracking Camera
description:
Runpu NDI PTZ Camera is designed for video conferencing, live streaming, and church use. It uses a Sony 2 MP CMOS sensor to provide 1080P Full-HD video output with multiple connection options.

The camera supports AI Smart Tracking to follow moving subjects automatically. It offers optical zoom, flexible pan movement, and installation options for different indoor setups. It can connect through RJ45 with PoE support and works with Windows and macOS systems.

name: SHIWOJIA 36X Zoom Solar Security Camera
description:
This outdoor security camera uses 36X optical zoom and 12MP (6K) resolution to capture clear details from distant areas. It supports 4G SIM or 2.4GHz Wi-Fi connection and offers 360° viewing with Pan/Tilt/Zoom technology.

It includes a 10W solar panel, 20,000mAh rechargeable battery, PIR human detection, night vision, and cloud or TF Card storage. The camera can be accessed remotely through the UBOX app on Android and iOS devices.

name: KERUI Fingerprint Lock
description:
KERUI Fingerprint Lock offers keyless access with a built-in rechargeable lithium battery and USB charging support. It uses fingerprint recognition for unlocking and has a zinc alloy body with IP67 waterproof protection.

The portable lock features a compact and lightweight design for storage and outdoor use. It supports multiple fingerprint storage and works without keys, passwords, Bluetooth, or an app.

name: RAYKUBE V1 Bluetooth Fingerprint Smart Lock
description:
This smart cylinder lock uses Bluetooth connectivity and offers multiple unlocking methods including APP, fingerprint, password, RFID card, and mechanical key access. It is designed for steel, wooden, brass, and stainless steel doors with an aluminium alloy body and dry battery power supply.

The lock includes biometric, key, and keypad functions with a reversible handle direction and polished finish type. It supports gateway connectivity and can be controlled through the available access options using Bluetooth technology.

name: RAYKUBE K20 Biometric Smart Door Lock
description:
This electronic door lock supports Tuya smart home platform and uses Bluetooth connectivity for smart access control. It allows unlocking through fingerprint, password, IC card, mechanical keys, and app control with a zinc alloy body.

The lock includes biometric, key, and keypad functions with gateway support and a reversible handle direction. It is suitable for different door types with thicknesses between 26–50 mm and uses dry battery power.

name: RAYKUBE L31 Smart Fingerprint Door Lock
description:
This smart cylinder lock supports Tuya Smart Home Platform and can be controlled through Tuya or Smart Life App with Bluetooth connectivity. It provides multiple unlocking options including fingerprint, IC card, NFC, mechanical keys, and app access.

The lock is made with aluminium alloy material and features a polished finish with gateway support. It has a reversible handle direction and is suitable for steel, wooden, brass, stainless steel, and other doors.

name: GUHUAVMI ET571 Health Monitoring Smartwatch
description:
This smartwatch is designed with a square display and supports multiple operating systems for Android and iOS users. It includes health monitoring functions, Bluetooth calling, voice assistant support, and smart features for everyday use.

The device has an AMOLED touchscreen, stainless steel band, and built-in battery with extended standby capability. It also provides activity tracking, sports modes, notifications, and various tools such as alarms, weather, and music playback.
features: ECG and HRV heart health monitoring
Blood pressure and blood oxygen monitoring

name: 3 Pack Outdoor Solar Motion Sensor Lights
description:
These outdoor solar lights use solar power and are designed for areas such as porches, garages, yard entrances, and patios. They feature LED bulbs with a motion sensor for automatic operation.

The lights include a 1400mAh lithium battery, ABS body material, and a self-contained installation method. They come with included bulbs and batteries and support dimmable lighting.

name: Neon RGB LED Strip Light
description:
This flexible neon LED strip light provides RGB lighting for gaming setups, living rooms, and bedrooms. It supports remote and app control for adjusting different colors and lighting combinations.

The strip uses SMD5050 LED chips with COB strip technology and a waterproof design. It is powered by DC and can be used to create different lighting atmospheres for various occasions.

name: 220V COB LED Strip Light
description:
This COB LED strip light features 296 LEDs per meter and provides flexible lighting options for rooms, kitchens, outdoor areas, and creative projects. It supports multiple color temperatures and offers dimmable lighting adjustment.

The strip uses AC 220V–230V power and has a waterproof IP65 design with flexible construction. It can be bent around curves, cut at 12.5cm intervals, and uses COB LED technology with a 50,000-hour lifespan.

name: Ultra 2 AMOLED Smart Watch
description:
This smartwatch features a square AMOLED touch display with a sapphire crystal dial window and an alloy case. It works with Android and iOS devices through the Fit Cloud Pro app. Bluetooth calling and built-in GPS add convenient everyday connectivity.

It supports health monitoring, activity tracking, and a wide range of sports modes for daily use. You can also access message reminders, music control, customizable watch faces, calendar tools, and other built-in functions from your wrist.

name: ECG Health Analysis Smart Watch
description:
This smartwatch features a high-resolution AMOLED touch display with ECG and PPG health analysis through the G Band app. It supports Android and iOS devices, offering AI health insights and detailed body analysis in a simple wearable design.

It provides continuous health monitoring alongside activity tracking for everyday use. Additional tools such as Bluetooth calling, message reminders, wireless charging, customizable watch faces, and practical daily functions make it suitable for regular wear.

name: Women AMOLED ECG Smart Watch
description:
This smartwatch features a round AMOLED touch screen with ECG monitoring, health tracking functions, and G band app integration. It supports Android and iOS devices with Bluetooth calling and customizable AI watch dials.

The watch provides activity tracking, sleep analysis, stress monitoring, and women's health features for daily use. It also includes practical tools such as message reminders, music control, weather display, and multiple time functions.

name: Ultra Thin AMOLED Smart Watch
description:
This smartwatch features a 2.0-inch AMOLED full touch display with always-on display support and a square design. It supports Android and iOS devices with Bluetooth calling, AI voice assistant, and customizable watch faces.

The watch provides health monitoring, activity tracking, and multiple sports modes for everyday use. It also includes practical functions such as music control, notifications, weather display, phone finding, and NFC door unlocking.
